purpose: Define source-safe preview validation for dynamic postulation forms by tenant/project/role without enabling runtime writes or raw sensitive file handling.
fieldRules: Every dynamic field must have a stable fieldId and formVersion.
Sensitive or private document fields must use file_ref_pending_storage or private_file_ref, never raw files or base64.
Fields classified admin_restricted or finance_restricted must not be shopperVisible after submission unless explicitly safe.
Phase A must not request raw bank, identity document, NDA, address, WhatsApp body or attachment content in preview input.
Project-specific fields must be driven by project configuration, not hard-coded to Cinepolis.
Questionnaire destination fields must remain separate from postulation form fields.
ProposedDate fields must be validated later by visit lifecycle/reservation rules.
Visit references must use visitId, hrRowId or sourceVisitRef; no visual dedupe.
postulationRules: A postulation must include tenantId, projectId, formId, formVersion, postulationId and shopperId.
A postulation that targets a visit must include visitId, hrRowId or sourceVisitRef.
Missing required non-sensitive fields returns missing_required_fields.
Missing or ambiguous stable references returns manual_review_required.
Sensitive raw field names or raw file values return sensitive_field_review_required.
Valid postulation preview is not an assignment and does not imply HR sync.
Approval moves to assignment sync gate later; this preview does not call Make or write HR.
claudePrototypeImpact: Postulation UI must be dynamic by project and formVersion.
Do not hard-code front/back fields only for Cinepolis.
Show safe states for private fields: protected, pending backend, private reference or requires authorization.
Do not show uploaded/raw sensitive files while Storage gates are off.
Approval should say prepared/pending HR sync later, not HR synchronized.
Academia must explain dynamic form configuration, field sensitivity and postulation review by role.

newLessons: How a project defines its postulation form
What a shopper sees before applying
How approval later enters assignment sync

hardStops: Do not call Make from this preview.
Do not write HR from this preview.
Do not write Firestore from this preview.
Do not upload Storage files from this preview.
Do not process raw sensitive fields.
Do not treat postulation as assignment.
Do not mark HR synchronized while sync gates are off.
